name: lock file _meta sections list contains exactly the fifteen named sections per the contract
command: printf '{"plugin_version":"1.9.0","_meta":{"sections":["rubric","detectors","standards","compliance","prompts","models","pr_corpus","profile","verify","workflow_state","standards_freshness","pr_corpus_freshness","compliance_freshness","rule_cache","quality_standards_directory"]}}\n' > lock.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-lock.sh" --lock lock.json --check sections 2>out.txt && grep -q 'sections_count=15' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
